title: hesperis meyeri
intro: Hesperis meyeri, also known as the Yellow Rocket or Rocket Larkspur, is a perennial plant belonging to the Borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hesperis meyeri include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Hesperis meyeri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine for its calming and soothing effects.
